<!-- Generated by agents-reverse-engineer v1.2.12 -->

# src

Root source directory for agents-reverse-engineer — exports programmatic API via `core/index.ts`, implements CLI commands via `cli/`, orchestrates AI-powered documentation generation via `generation/` and `orchestration/`, provides quality validation via `quality/`, and supplies installer/integration tooling for AI coding assistants (Claude, OpenCode, Codex, Gemini).

## Contents

**[version.ts](./version.ts)** — Exports `getVersion()` to read package version from `package.json`.

## Subdirectories

**[ai/](./ai/)** — AIService orchestrator and backend registry for spawning AI CLI subprocesses with exponential backoff retry, timeout enforcement, rate limit detection, and per-run telemetry logging. Implements multi-backend abstraction (Claude, Codex, Gemini, OpenCode) with unified AIProvider/AIBackend interface, subprocess lifecycle management (SIGTERM→SIGKILL escalation), retry strategy (rate limits only, never timeouts), CWD override to prevent AI CLIs from discovering project context files that waste cache tokens.

**[change-detection/](./change-detection/)** — Provides git-based change detection and SHA-256 content hashing for incremental documentation updates. Uses simple-git for repository operations and Node.js crypto for file fingerprinting.

**[cli/](./cli/)** — Command-line interface entry points for all agents-reverse-engineer operations. Each file exports a command function consumed by the CLI router in `index.ts`, handling argument parsing, option validation, workflow orchestration, and exit code management. Commands: `init`, `discover`, `generate`, `update`, `clean`, `specify`, `rebuild`, `plan`, `implement`, `dashboard`.

**[config/](./config/)** — Defines schemas, defaults, and loading logic for `.agents-reverse-engineer/config.yaml`, providing all configuration primitives (exclude patterns, concurrency, compression, backend selection) consumed by the orchestration and generation layers.

**[core/](./core/)** — Core programmatic API barrel (`index.ts`) and logger abstraction (`logger.ts`) for agents-reverse-engineer engine — exports all reusable modules (AI, discovery, generation, orchestration, quality, change detection, config, imports) with `@beta` stability and zero forced console output for library consumers.

**[dashboard/](./dashboard/)** — Terminal-based telemetry dashboard for LLM API usage analytics: cost breakdowns, token metrics, execution timelines, and trend analysis from `.agents-reverse-engineer/logs/` run logs and `.agents-reverse-engineer/traces/` NDJSON files.

**[discovery/](./discovery/)** — File discovery orchestration using fast-glob traversal and filter chain processing (gitignore, vendor, binary, custom patterns).

**[generation/](./generation/)** — Orchestrates AI-powered documentation generation by transforming file/directory discovery plans into dependency-ordered execution tasks that produce .sum file summaries and AGENTS.md aggregations via Claude prompts enforcing density, behavioral contract preservation, and incremental update semantics.

**[implement/](./implement/)** — Executes AI-driven code changes in isolated worktrees with and without ARE documentation, evaluates quality via blind comparison (randomized plan A/plan B presentation with five weighted criteria), persists metrics (git stats, test/build/lint results, cost/latency deltas, quality scores) to `.agents-reverse-engineer/implementations/`.

**[imports/](./imports/)** — Extracts and classifies TypeScript/JavaScript import statements from source files, producing structured import graphs for LLM context generation.

**[installer/](./installer/)** — Interactive TTY wizard and non-interactive CLI for installing agents-reverse-engineer command templates, hooks, and runtime integrations into global/local config directories, managing `.gitignore`/`.vscode/settings.json` entries, and uninstalling all artifacts with surgical precision.

**[integration/](./integration/)** — Orchestrates AI coding assistant integration by detecting environments (Claude Code, OpenCode, Aider, Gemini), generating runtime-specific command files from shared definitions, and installing hooks into config directories.

**[orchestration/](./orchestration/)** — Orchestrates two-phase AI-driven documentation generation (file analysis → directory aggregation) with concurrency pooling, progress tracking, quality validation, and NDJSON tracing for multi-worker task coordination.

**[output/](./output/)** — Typed CLI logging with conditional ANSI formatting per CONTEXT.md human-readable output specification.

**[plan/](./plan/)** — A/B testing framework for AI planning quality: compares implementation plans generated with and without ARE documentation using parallel Git worktrees, quantitative metrics, and optional qualitative evaluation by a third AI judge.

**[quality/](./quality/)** — Detects documentation drift, code duplication, and phantom path references across the project by comparing TypeScript/JavaScript exports against .sum file documentation, identifying duplicate symbols across files, and validating AGENTS.md path references.

**[rebuild/](./rebuild/)** — Reconstructs project source code from specification documents through AI-driven code generation with ordered-phase execution, checkpoint-based resume, and context accumulation.

**[specify/](./specify/)** — Exports three-function specification generation pipeline: `buildSpecPrompt` constructs AI prompts from AGENTS.md docs + optional annex files → LLM produces spec markdown → `writeSpec` persists to single file or splits into slugified heading-based sections with `SpecExistsError` on collision.

**[types/](./types/)** — TypeScript type definitions shared across discovery, file traversal, and exclusion reporting modules.

**[update/](./update/)** — Incremental documentation synchronization: detects file changes, regenerates stale `.sum` files, removes orphaned documentation artifacts, and updates affected `AGENTS.md` files.

## Architecture

Three-tier command execution model:

1. **CLI Layer** (`cli/`) — argument parsing, config loading, backend resolution, AI service provisioning, trace/log setup, workflow invocation, exit code management
2. **Orchestration Layer** (`orchestration/`) — concurrency pooling via shared-iterator pattern, two-phase pipeline (file analysis → directory aggregation), quality validation (code-vs-doc, code-vs-code, phantom-paths), progress reporting, telemetry
3. **Generation Layer** (`generation/`) — prompt construction (file/directory templates), .sum serialization (YAML frontmatter + summary), AGENTS.md aggregation, annex overflow handling, incremental update preservation

Discovery pipeline: `discovery/walker.ts` (fast-glob traversal) → `discovery/filters/` (gitignore/vendor/binary/custom) → `generation/executor.ts` (execution plan) → `orchestration/runner.ts` (two-phase execution).

Quality pipeline: `quality/inconsistency/code-vs-doc.ts` (export-vs-.sum comparison) → `quality/inconsistency/code-vs-code.ts` (duplicate symbol detection) → `quality/phantom-paths/validator.ts` (AGENTS.md path validation) → `quality/inconsistency/reporter.ts` (aggregation, CLI/markdown formatting).

Telemetry pipeline: `ai/telemetry/logger.ts` (per-call entry accumulation) → `ai/telemetry/run-log.ts` (run log persistence) → `orchestration/trace.ts` (NDJSON event streaming) → `dashboard/` (cost/token/trend visualization).

## Stack

- **Runtime**: Node.js with TypeScript (tsconfig.json)
- **AI Backends**: Claude CLI, OpenAI Codex, Google Gemini, OpenCode (subprocess adapters in `ai/backends/`)
- **File Traversal**: fast-glob (walker.ts)
- **Git Operations**: simple-git (change-detection, plan worktrees, implement worktrees)
- **YAML Parsing**: Custom frontmatter regex in `generation/writers/sum.ts`
- **JSONC Editing**: jsonc-parser (installer settings.json merging)
- **Markdown Rendering**: Custom formatters in dashboard/views/, quality/inconsistency/reporter.ts
- **NDJSON Streaming**: readline for trace parsing (dashboard/trace-reader.ts)
- **Chart.js**: CDN-loaded for HTML reports (dashboard/html-report.ts)

## API Surface

**Programmatic API** (via `core/index.ts`):
- **Logger**: `nullLogger`, `consoleLogger`, `Logger`
- **AI**: `AIService`, `AIProvider`, `AIBackend`, `SubprocessProvider`, `withRetry`, `DEFAULT_RETRY_OPTIONS`
- **Discovery**: `discoverFiles`, `walkDirectory`, `applyFilters`, `FileFilter`, `FilterResult`
- **Generation Prompts**: `buildFilePrompt`, `buildDirectoryPrompt`, `detectLanguage`
- **Generation Writers**: `writeSumFile`, `readSumFile`, `writeAgentsMd`, `writeAgentsMdHub`, `writeClaudeMdPointer`
- **Orchestration**: `DocumentationOrchestrator`, `buildExecutionPlan`, `formatExecutionPlanAsMarkdown`, `runPool`
- **Quality**: `extractExports`, `checkCodeVsDoc`, `checkCodeVsCode`, `checkPhantomPaths`, `buildInconsistencyReport`
- **Change Detection**: `computeContentHash`, `isGitRepo`, `getChangedFiles`
- **Config**: `loadConfig`, `findProjectRoot`, `Config`
- **Imports**: `extractImports`, `extractDirectoryImports`, `formatImportMap`

**CLI Commands** (via `cli/index.ts`):
- `are init` — create config, update .gitignore/.vscode/settings.json
- `are discover` — walk directory, generate GENERATION-PLAN.md
- `are generate` — full two-phase documentation generation
- `are update` — incremental regeneration for changed files
- `are clean` — delete .sum/AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md artifacts
- `are specify` — synthesize spec from AGENTS.md docs
- `are rebuild` — reconstruct project from spec
- `are plan` — A/B test planning with/without docs
- `are implement` — A/B test implementation with/without docs
- `are dashboard` — telemetry visualization (table/JSON/HTML/trends/timeline)

## Behavioral Contracts

**Exit Codes**:
- 0 — all operations succeeded
- 1 — partial failure (some files/tasks failed)
- 2 — total failure (CLI not found, no files processed, conflict detection)

**Retry Strategy**: AIService retries only `RATE_LIMIT` errors (never `TIMEOUT`), uses exponential backoff with jitter, emits `{type:'retry', attempt, taskLabel, errorCode}` trace events.

**Timeout Enforcement**: `runSubprocess()` enforces `timeoutMs` with SIGTERM→SIGKILL escalation after 5s grace period, attempts process group kill before falling back to single process.

**Concurrency Model**: `runPool()` uses shared-iterator pattern (workers pull from `tasks.entries()` iterator), starts new task immediately when prior completes, avoiding batch-idle anti-pattern.

**Checkpoint Resume**: `rebuild/checkpoint.ts` tracks per-module status (`pending`/`done`/`failed`) with spec hash validation, supports resume from partial runs.

**Progress Monitoring**: Commands write logs to `.agents-reverse-engineer/logs/{command}-{backend}-{model}-{timestamp}.log` for `tail -f` monitoring, telemetry to `.agents-reverse-engineer/logs/run-{command}-{backend}-{model}-{timestamp}.json`.

**Trace Output**: Commands with `--trace` flag write NDJSON events to `.agents-reverse-engineer/traces/trace-{timestamp}.ndjson`, subprocess logs to `.agents-reverse-engineer/subprocess-logs/{timestamp}/`.

**Variant Routing**: `variant` parameter writes `.${variant}.sum` and `AGENTS.${variant}.md`, hub files import `@AGENTS.${activeVariant}.md`, variant files bypass user-preservation logic.

## File Relationships

- `cli/index.ts` routes commands to `cli/{command}.ts`
- `cli/{command}.ts` imports orchestrators from `orchestration/`, `generation/`, `plan/`, `implement/`, `specify/`, `rebuild/`, `update/`
- `orchestration/runner.ts` imports `buildFilePrompt`/`buildDirectoryPrompt` from `generation/prompts/`, `writeSumFile`/`writeAgentsMd` from `generation/writers/`, quality checks from `quality/`
- `generation/prompts/builder.ts` imports `extractImports`/`formatImportMap` from `imports/`, `detectLanguage` from `generation/prompts/`
- `ai/service.ts` wraps `ai/backends/` in `ai/providers/subprocess.ts`, uses `ai/retry.ts` for exponential backoff
- `dashboard/index.ts` imports cost calculators from `dashboard/cost-calculator.ts`, log readers from `dashboard/log-reader.ts`/`dashboard/trace-reader.ts`, view renderers from `dashboard/views/`

## Workflow & Conventions

**Subprocess CWD Override**: When spawning AI CLI subprocesses, set CWD to `os.tmpdir()` via `AIService.setSubprocessCwd()` to prevent AI CLIs (especially Claude) from discovering project context files (CLAUDE.md, package.json, CLAUDE_CONTEXT.md) that waste cache tokens on automatic ingestion.

**User Content Preservation**: User-authored AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md detected by absence of `GENERATED_MARKER_PREFIX`, renamed to .local.md on first generation, preserved via `@{filename}.local.md` import directive.

**Dry-Run Mode**: All commands support `--dry-run`, which prints plan/preview without executing AI calls or file writes. Used for cost estimation and workflow validation.

**Model Upgrades**: `specify.ts` and `rebuild.ts` upgrade default `sonnet` to `opus` for quality. Command-line `--model` flag overrides upgrade logic.

**Timeout Extensions**: `specify.ts` and `rebuild.ts` extend AI timeout to 900s minimum for long-running operations.

**Worktree Management**: `plan.ts` and `implement.ts` create temporary git worktrees with branch naming `are/{plan|implement}/{with-docs|without-docs}/{taskSlug}`. Cleanup: SIGINT/SIGTERM handlers call `worktrees.cleanup()` to remove worktrees (branches preserved).
